caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on the topic of "Rural Community Food System," focusing on creating a sustainable and localized food system for rural communities. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking to the audience. The main content of the video is displayed on the left side, featuring an introduction that discusses sourcing food locally from community-owned operations. Below the introduction, there is a list of session videos with various dates, indicating multiple sessions or recordings related to this topic. On the right side, there is a complex visual diagram with interconnected nodes and lines, representing different elements and relationships within the food system. This diagram likely serves as a visual aid to help explain the concepts being discussed. The video also includes information on how viewers can contribute to the development of the model by adding comments or becoming a member, along with contact details and references for further reading.
